trade.summary: France imports Brazilian soybeans, beef, coffee, and aircraft. Brazil imports French aircraft, pharmaceuticals, perfumes, and luxury goods. Airbus and Embraer have important commercial ties.

diplomatic.summary: Relations are generally positive but marked by periodic friction over Amazon deforestation. France has been one of the most vocal European critics of Brazilian environmental policy. France's Guiana shares a long border with Brazil, creating specific bilateral issues.
recent_incidents: France threatened to block EU-Mercosur deal over Amazon deforestation concerns (2019-2024)

military.summary: Brazil acquired French Scorpène-class submarines (Riachuelo program) in a major defense deal. France and Brazil have a significant submarine construction cooperation agreement. Joint border patrols in Guiana-Brazil border area.

financial.summary: France is a significant investor in Brazil through major corporations (Total, Renault, Michelin, L'Oréal, BNP Paribas). Bilateral investment flows are substantial.

energy.summary: TotalEnergies is active in Brazilian offshore oil. Some trade in biofuels. Cooperation on hydropower and energy efficiency.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific ties. IRD and CIRAD have long-term research programs in the Amazon and Cerrado. French universities partner with Brazilian institutions in biodiversity and climate research.
